{"code":"# Get merged PRs that close a Linear issue
prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="merged")
linear_prs = [p for p in prs if p["closes_linear"]]

# Create issues for each
created = 0
for p in linear_prs:
    title = f"Verify: {p['title']}"
    repo = "acme/web"
    result = github.create_issue(repo=repo, title=title)
    created += 1
    print(f"Created issue #{created}:…(+24)
